examples: The next was too tall. "What a maypole!"
An' this go on, I shall presently be hung like a very maypole with fantastic gauds and make-believe honours.
Maypole is based around the idea of a request object.
In place of the livestock, he proposed that Keating enliven the pasture with children encircling a maypole.
During the summer gala its choir sings and pupils dance round the Maypole.
